title: Minevui Optimized
description: Optimized Minecraft Client for Multiplayer play.
body:
# ⚡ Optimized Client Modpack
Looking for a performance-boosting modpack that makes Minecraft run smoother and faster without altering the vanilla experience? This is the perfect choice for you!

## 🚀 Features:
- Powered by Sodium for improved graphics and FPS boosts.
- Optimized performance to reduce lag, especially on lower-end PCs.
- Enhanced multiplayer experience, making online gameplay smoother.
- Lightweight and vanilla-friendly, keeping the core gameplay intact.
## 📦 Version Details:
- Minecraft: 1.21.3 - 1.21.7
- Fabric Loader: Latest Fabric Loader per MC version.

🔥 If you want a faster, more stable Minecraft experience for both solo and multiplayer, this modpack is for you!

👉 Download now and enjoy a lag-free adventure!
